who: medical billing offices processing 10–20 payroll submissions/month
offer: For medical billing offices processing 10–20 payroll submissions/month, manual data entry causes late payroll submissions. We automate timesheet data extraction instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: manual data entry errors and time consumption in payroll submissions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing offices with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among billing offices
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
